ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the grant (e.g., Central, State) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Department's address */,
  "email" TEXT /* Department's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Department's phone number */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department receiving the grant */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial year of the grant allocation */,
  "amount_sanctioned" REAL /* Amount sanctioned for the grant */,
  "purpose" INTEGER /* Reference to the purpose of the grant */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., recurring, one-time) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the grant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_financial_year FOREIGN KEY ("financial_year") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial year (e.g., 2015-2016) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the grant purpose */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the grant purpose (e.g., education, healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department submitting the application */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant being applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, finance officer, department head) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created grant, updated application) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source (e.g., Central, State) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the grant allocated from this funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant allocation */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant being allocated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding source */,
  "amount_allocated" REAL /* Amount allocated from the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_allocations_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_allocations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant utilization */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant being utilized */,
  "amount_utilized" REAL /* Amount utilized from the grant */,
  "utilization_date" TEXT /* Date when the grant was utilized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_utilization_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_grants" INTEGER /* Total number of grants in the report */,
  "total_amount_sanctioned" REAL /* Total amount sanctioned across all grants in the report */,
  "total_amount_allocated" REAL /* Total amount allocated across all grants in the report */,
  "total_amount_utilized" REAL /* Total amount utilized across all grants in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the notification is intended for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., grant approved, application submitted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant application being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES grant_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
